content: Phase 2.0: Design pass for orchestrator cockpit UI
Phase 2.1: Backend - Mongo models + state machine + event ledger + repositories
Phase 2.2: Backend - API routes + SSE event ledger
Phase 2.3: Frontend - cockpit shell + theme tokens + routing + API client + SSE hook + reusable components
Phase 2.4: Frontend - 10 pages (Dashboard, NewProject, Cockpit, BRD, Architecture, Plan, Files, Build, Acceptance, Export)
Phase 2.5: End-to-end testing via testing_agent_v3 covering all 10 user stories
